name: Cloak of Speed
description: History Before Patch X.32.7.0 (Feb 2020), this item had an MP cost of 70, an invisible duration of 4 seconds, and a cooldown of 5 seconds.
effects: After exiting sneak: Fire 2 additional projectiles dealing damage equal to your Lethal Strike damage for 2.4 seconds. Sneak: Invisible for 5 seconds. After 1 second can be canceled by shooting. On Invisible end: Lethal Strike: Your weapon deals 40 (+1 per WIS > 34) and 30% (+0.5% per WIS > 34) of target’s defense as additional damage for 2.4 seconds MP Cost: 2 MP/proj Cooldown: 0.1 sec
